name: Site24x7
description: Monitor Site24x7 infrastructure monitoring configuration including monitor health, alerts, SSL certificate monitoring, and notification profiles for compliance evidence

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to Zoho Developer Console (https://api-console.zoho.com for US, or your regional equivalent) and create a Self Client.
2. Generate a grant token with scopes: Site24x7.Reports.Read, Site24x7.Admin.Read, Site24x7.Operations.Read.
3. Exchange the grant token for an access token and refresh token via POST to https://accounts.zoho.com/oauth/v2/token.
4. Enter the access token above.
5. Enter your data center domain (e.g. site24x7.com for US, site24x7.eu for Europe).

credentialFields.label: Zoho OAuth Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Generate via Zoho Developer Console (Self Client). Requires scopes: Site24x7.Reports.Read, Site24x7.Admin.Read, Site24x7.Operations.Read. See https://www.site24x7.com/help/api/#authentication

credentialFields.label: Data Center Domain
credentialFields.helpText: Your Site24x7 data center domain. Options: site24x7.com (US), site24x7.eu (EU), site24x7.in (India), site24x7.cn (China), site24x7.net.au (Australia), site24x7.ca (Canada), site24x7.sa (Saudi Arabia). For Japan use app.site24x7.jp, UK use app.site24x7.uk, UAE use app.site24x7.ae.

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verify that the Site24x7 API is reachable by retrieving the current status of all monitors

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: List all monitors and check their health status to ensure infrastructure monitoring is active

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Check recent alert logs to verify that alerting is active and incidents are being tracked

checks.name: TLS / HTTPS
checks.description: Check that SSL/TLS certificate monitors are configured to track certificate expiry and validity

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verify notification profiles are configured to ensure alerts are properly routed to the right contacts
